what_it_does: Multi-agent OS-level orchestration. Lifecycle generation counters, pre-fire crash-safe idempotent execution, DAG dependency tracking with blocked_by/blocks.
operational_patterns: Lifecycle generation counter — prevents restart race conditions
Pre-fire attempt timestamp — crash-safe idempotent execution
DAG dependency tracking with blocked_by/blocks relationships
Hierarchical task decomposition with runtime assignment
redundancy_risk: HIGH — UMH OrganismCoordinator already absorbed generation counter, pre-fire markers, and DAG tracking from cortextOS in Phase 2
umh_mapping: substrate/organism/coordinator.py — all three patterns already implemented
eos_relevance: Indirect — coordinator powers EOS agent execution
